tasks.title: MCP Args Guardrail choke point
tasks.goal: Ensure every Tableau MCP query path passes one args guardrail before execution.
implementation_scope: Validate connection and datasource authorization
Validate datasource LUID source
Validate fields against metadata whitelist
Validate aggregation, filters, sort, limit, timeout, max rows, max fields
must_not: Leave any問数 path able to call Tableau MCP without Guardrail
Hardcode business terms in Python
Return fake success on Guardrail reject
deliverables: All MCP query paths routed through Guardrail
validation: Unit tests for unknown field, illegal datasource, illegal aggregation, unbounded detail query
Trace check for Guardrail pass on successful query
acceptance_criteria: No问数 MCP execution path bypasses Guardrail
Guardrail rejects unsafe args with diagnostic error
Successful query emits Guardrail pass trace

tasks.title: Reviewed MCP baselines and comparator seed
tasks.goal: Create reviewed baseline fixtures and a comparator foundation for Q1/Q6/Q10.
allowed_read_scopes: existing comparator or quality gate utilities
implementation_scope: Create reviewed MCP snapshots for Q1, Q6, Q10
Compare fields, row count, Top N order, numeric tolerance, derived metrics
Classify failure layer
must_not: Treat inbox files as formal baseline fixtures
Use natural language answer as numeric source
Hardcode case-specific business labels in Python
validation: Comparator passes against reviewed baseline self-check
Comparator detects field, row, order, and numeric mismatch
acceptance_criteria: Q1/Q6/Q10 baselines are reproducible
Comparator can run offline
Report distinguishes no MCP, MCP failure, contract failure, numeric mismatch

tasks.title: Controlled QuerySpec fallback and trace
tasks.goal: Convert QuerySpec planning, validation, and repair failures into controlled MCP fallback triggers.
allowed_write_scopes: QuerySpec success and fallback rate metrics
implementation_scope: Fallback on planning skill missing, QuerySpec invalid, validation failed, repair failed
Emit FALLBACK_TRIGGERED or WARN with reason and original error
Route fallback args through Guardrail
must_not: Fallback silently
Treat MCP proxy/direct as default long-term path
Use renderer unavailable as query fallback trigger
validation: Q1/Q6/Q10 enter tableau_mcp when QuerySpec fails
Fallback events include reason and original QuerySpec error
Fallback args pass through Guardrail
acceptance_criteria: No QS_LLM_INVALID hard stop when MCP baseline can answer
Every fallback is observable
QuerySpec success rate and fallback rate are reportable

tasks.title: Dynamic Column Engine and Metrics Registry
tasks.goal: Compute derived metrics deterministically after MCP rows and before renderer.
implementation_scope: Load metric formulas from non-Python registry
Append derived columns to response_data
Handle division by zero and missing source fields deterministically
must_not: Hardcode metric names, labels, or formulas in Python
Let LLM or Renderer calculate derived metrics
Overwrite MCP source rows
validation: Unit tests for derived metric formulas
Missing input field produces diagnostic result
Renderer receives already computed values
acceptance_criteria: Derived metrics are present in response_data or table_display
Derived values are deterministic
No business metric literal is required in Python code

tasks.title: Unified table response contract
tasks.goal: Make SSE table_data and final done.response_data use one table structure source.
allowed_write_scopes: frontend table data adapter if needed
implementation_scope: Emit response_type table for successful问数
Include response_data.fields, rows, table_display
Use same normalized table object for table_data and done
must_not: Emit answer-only success for table-capable问数
Let frontend infer table schema from prose
Create divergent table_data and done.response_data payloads
validation: Backend contract tests for done.response_data
SSE test that table_data and done share equivalent source
Frontend test for fields/rows rendering
acceptance_criteria: Successful问数 returns table response_type
fields and rows are non-empty
Frontend can render without guessing

tasks.title: Q1/Q6/Q10 quality gate
tasks.goal: Block regressions where Mulan is worse than MCP baseline for first canary set.
implementation_scope: Compare MCP baseline, Mulan response_data, and UI tableData
Check fields, row count, Top N order, numeric tolerance
Fail on missing Guardrail pass or silent fallback
must_not: Mark answer text as pass without response_data match
Commit code before this gate passes
Ignore fallback rate in report
validation: Gate passes for compliant fixtures
Gate fails for missing field, wrong order, numeric drift, no Guardrail trace
Gate output names failure category
acceptance_criteria: Q1/Q6/Q10 pass against reviewed MCP baseline
All three enter tableau_mcp
All three include non-empty table response_data

tasks.title: Q4/Q8 extension and rate metrics
tasks.goal: Extend canary coverage and expose QuerySpec main-path success and fallback rate.
implementation_scope: Add Q4 and Q8 baselines
Track QuerySpec main-path success rate
Track fallback rate by day or version
must_not: Hide fallback rate behind aggregate pass
Accept QuerySpec success rate below 80 percent without explicit failure
Use ad hoc case-specific Python rules
validation: Gate runs Q1/Q4/Q6/Q8/Q10
Metrics report includes QuerySpec success rate and fallback rate
Threshold breach is visible
acceptance_criteria: Five canaries are repeatable
Failures identify affected layer
QuerySpec success rate below 80 percent fails the quality gate

tasks.title: Renderer output skill contract
tasks.goal: Restrict renderer to explanation and display formatting over computed response_data.
implementation_scope: Renderer consumes question, fields, rows, field types, derived columns
Renderer formats labels, units, and Chinese summary
Renderer unavailable returns deterministic table output
must_not: Renderer calculates business metrics
Renderer modifies rows, sort, or filter scope
Renderer unavailable triggers query fallback
validation: Renderer receives computed derived columns
Renderer outage preserves response_data
Answer mismatch against rows is flagged
acceptance_criteria: Same response_data yields stable facts across models
Text differences do not change facts
Renderer failure does not rerun query

tasks.title: Batch 2 full gate and commit decision
tasks.goal: Run full Batch 2 baseline comparison and allow commit only if the gate passes.
allowed_write_scopes: formal test report location if required
implementation_scope: Run Q1-Q10 baseline comparison
Run backend and frontend validation required by changed files
Prepare commit only after all gates pass
must_not: Commit if Batch 2 baseline comparison fails
Mix unrelated user changes into commit
Downgrade gate failures to warnings
validation: Batch 2 Q1-Q10 comparison passes
Project-required tests pass for touched files
git status reviewed before staging
acceptance_criteria: No canary is worse than MCP baseline
No Guardrail bypass exists
Commit is allowed only after all validation passes
